title: Support for named structure fields in FST (and potentially VCD) dumps
body:
I don't know if this is possible or not within the constraints of the FST format, or whether this is a limitation of Verilator's FST generation, but where RTL contains a variable which is an instance of a user defined structure, it would be very helpful if the FST dump contained individual names signals for each structure element/field instead of just a flat vector.

Further complications include:
- Nested structures
- Unions
- Arrays of structures
- Arrays of structures within other other structures
etc. etc.

So this would possibly be a significant amount of effort?
I was assuming if not directly supported, a struct variable could be represented in the dump as a pseudo module in the hierarchy, perhaps allowing even VCD format to support this?

Appologies if this has been raised before, a quick search didn't show any similar issues.
